name: Main Zameen Tu Aasmaan
overview: "Main Zameen Tu Aasmaan" is an emotional and gripping drama that explores love, dreams, and the struggles that test relationships. It is the story of two souls, Shazil and Hooram, tied by destiny one grounded like the zameen, the other limitless like the aasmaan. Their bond is strong, yet life puts them through trials that shake their faith, test their patience, and question their choices.

trailers.title: Main Zameen Tu Aasmaan | First Look | Ft. Feroze Khan - Hiba Bukhari | Coming Soon Only on Green TV
